notes: Fixture corpus for age_range compound-normalizer PR-135.
Includes Class A deterministic-covered, Class B deterministic-missed/human-labeled, and Class C adversarial/out-of-scope cases.
Includes cross-family prompts combining age_range with availability, vessel_tonnage, and coc_country_match across Classes A, B, and C while scoring age_range only.
DOB and birth-year phrasing is routed to unapplied in v1; the catalog row represents candidate age in years, not date-of-birth conversion.
